login.title: Access the platform
login.subtitle: Access the internal employee experience, join in and follow the competition.
login.helpText: If you forgot your password, contact IT so we can assign you a temporary one.

changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.subtitle: You must change your temporary password before continuing.

errors.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.sessionValidationFailed: The session could not be validated.

updatePassword.title: Update your password
updatePassword.subtitle: Your account must change its password before continuing.
updatePassword.mustChangeNotice: You must set a new password to continue using the app.

errors.passwordTooShort: The new password must be at least 8 characters long.
errors.updatePasswordFailed: The password could not be updated.
errors.updateProfileFailed: The profile could not be updated.
errors.unexpected: Unexpected error while updating the password.

home.heroSubtitle: Complete your predictions before the deadline and follow the most important PUMA matches.
home.predictChampionText: Get it right and earn 20 extra points for the ranking.
home.championStillEditable: You can still change your selection before the deadline.
home.championClosedFinal: The deadline is closed and this is your final prediction.
home.championClosedText: The deadline to predict the champion has ended.
home.pendingSummary: You still have {pending} predictions to complete and {closingToday} matches close today.

loggedOut.title: Sign in to participate
loggedOut.description: Sign in with your account to save your prediction before the match starts.

open.description: You can change your scoreline until the match starts.

closed.withPredictionTitle: You can no longer edit your prediction
closed.withoutPredictionTitle: You did not submit your prediction in time
closed.description: Predictions closed when the match started.
closed.savedMessage: Your prediction has been saved and will be evaluated when the match finishes.
closed.missedMessage: You missed this one. When the final result is published, you will not score points for this match.

finished.title: Result and points
finished.description: Here you can compare the real scoreline with your prediction.
finished.noPredictionTitle: You did not register a prediction for this match
finished.noPredictionDescription: Since you did not submit a scoreline before kick-off, you do not earn points here.

predictionForm.description: Enter your estimated final score. You can change it until the match starts.

errors.locked: Predictions closed when the match started.
errors.invalidScores: Scores must be valid integers greater than or equal to 0.
errors.saveFailed: The prediction could not be saved: {message}

exact.title: ✅ Exact prediction
exact.subtitle: You earned {points} points
exact.description: You guessed the final score of this match.

trend.title: 🟡 You got the winner right
trend.subtitle: You earned {points} point{points, plural, one {} other {s}}
trend.description: You did not get the exact score, but you got the match result right.

miss.title: ❌ Prediction missed
miss.subtitle: You earned 0 points
miss.description: Your prediction does not match the final result.

noPrediction.title: ⚪ You did not submit a prediction
noPrediction.subtitle: You did not score points in this match
noPrediction.description: The match has already finished and there was no prediction registered.

pending.title: 🕒 Match pending
pending.subtitle: The score will be calculated when it finishes
pending.description: If you already submitted your prediction, it will be locked when the match starts.

puma.dualDefault: Wherever you play, play For the Love of the Shirt ❤👕

champion.title: Champion prediction
champion.description: Choose the team you think will win the World Cup. This prediction can only be submitted until the deadline.

myPredictions.title: My predictions
myPredictions.subtitle: Review what is still pending, what is waiting to be resolved and how your points are going.

empty.title: You haven't made any predictions yet
empty.subtitle: Go to the matches list and start playing.

ranking.title: Ranking
ranking.intro: Your current position and the full tournament standings.
ranking.pumaMatchBonus: PUMA Match games grant 1 extra point for a correct pick.
ranking.loadErrorMessage: The ranking could not be loaded. Check the {viewName} view.
ranking.insidePrizePositions: You are currently in prize positions.
ranking.aheadOfParticipants: You are ahead of {percent}% of participants.
ranking.podiumHintOutside: What you need to enter the podium
ranking.pumaChallengeText: The top-ranked players will be eligible for final prizes.
ranking.notRankedTitle: You are not in the ranking yet
ranking.notRankedText: As soon as you register your first scoring predictions, you will see your position and stats here.
ranking.yourSurroundingsText: Your position with the nearest places above and below you.
ranking.whatSeparatesYou: What separates you from the next place
ranking.battleReference: Your immediate reference above and below in the standings.
ranking.youAreFirst: You are first. Everyone is chasing you.
ranking.youCloseRanking: You are currently at the bottom of the ranking.
ranking.youAreTiedAbove: You are tied with the person above. Tiebreakers decide it.
ranking.pointsToNextPlace: You are {points} away from the next place.
ranking.fullRankingText: Ordered by points, exact hits and trends.
ranking.emptyRanking: There is not enough data yet to show the ranking.
ranking.summaryPointsNoChange: No change in points compared with {reference}.
ranking.summaryPointsMore_one: You have {count} more point than in {reference}.
ranking.summaryPointsMore_other: You have {count} more points than in {reference}.
ranking.summaryPointsLess_one: You have {count} fewer point than in {reference}.
ranking.summaryPointsLess_other: You have {count} fewer points than in {reference}.
